title: Biggest Single Number
titleCn: 只出现一次的最大数字

testcases.input: MyNumbers table: +-----+ | num | +-----+ | 8 | | 8 | | 3 | | 3 | | 1 | | 4 | | 5 | | 6 | +-----+ Output: +-----+ | num | +-----+ | 6 | +-----+ Explanation: The single numbers are 1, 4, 5, and 6. Since 6 is the largest single number, we return it.
testcases.expectedOutput: +-----+ | num | +-----+ | 6 | +-----+ Explanation: The single numbers are 1, 4, 5, and 6. Since 6 is the largest single number, we return it.

testcases.input: MyNumbers table: +-----+ | num | +-----+ | 8 | | 8 | | 7 | | 7 | | 3 | | 3 | | 3 | +-----+ Output: +------+ | num | +------+ | null | +------+ Explanation: There are no single numbers in the input table so we return null.
testcases.expectedOutput: +------+ | num | +------+ | null | +------+ Explanation: There are no single numbers in the input table so we return null.
